## Checklist for link PRs

- [ ] The link is a **primary source** per `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The link is dated or versioned.
- [ ] The link is accessible without login (or this is documented).
- [ ] The annotation answers *why read this*, not *what it is*.
- [ ] If replacing: the existing link and the rationale for the swap are stated above.
- [ ] I placed the link in the correct topic and the correct section (Start here / Go deeper / Tools / Watch).
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally.
- [ ] I did not introduce any new H2 headings in topic files.

## Checklist for structural PRs

- [ ] I updated `README.md` if file counts changed.
- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/` locally.
- [ ] I did not weaken any structural test.

## Not in scope?

Before opening, I have reviewed `CONTRIBUTING.md#not-in-scope`. This PR is **not** about general cybersecurity, general ML tutorials, academic ML theory, or opinion takes.
